compulsory.description: Absolute path where the app is scaffolded.
Brand/app name used in titles, SEO, manifest.

optional.unlocks: Page/event analytics. App fully works without it (no-op when unset).
AdSense slots on non-tool pages. Slots render nothing when unset.
Contact/feedback form submission via Formspree. Hidden/disabled when unset.
Client error monitoring. No-op when DSN unset.
Canonical URLs, sitemap absolute URLs, OG image base. Defaults to relative/localhost when unset.
Custom brand logo SVG; default text/icon mark used otherwise.
